resourceTemplates.name: threads-profile
resourceTemplates.title: Get Threads profile
resourceTemplates.description: Returns public Threads profile information using `username`, `url`, or `user_id`.

resourceTemplates.name: threads-user-posts
resourceTemplates.title: Get Threads user posts
resourceTemplates.description: Returns posts from a Threads user. Use `username` or `user_id` and paginate with `cursor` when available.

resourceTemplates.name: threads-post
resourceTemplates.title: Get Threads post
resourceTemplates.description: Returns a Threads post by `url` or `post_id`, including comments and related posts when available.

resourceTemplates.name: threads-search-users
resourceTemplates.title: Search Threads users
resourceTemplates.description: Searches Threads users by username or keyword and supports pagination with `cursor`.
